---
title: ""
page-layout: full
toc: false
---

<link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.googleapis.com">
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=JetBrains+Mono:wght@400;700&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">

<style>
#quarto-content { max-width: none !important; padding: 0 !important; margin: 0 !important; }
main.content, #quarto-document-content { padding: 0 !important; }
.quarto-title-block { display: none !important; }
body { overflow-x: hidden; background: #060f0e; }

.sr { opacity: 0; transform: translateY(30px); transition: opacity 0.8s ease, transform 0.8s ease; }
.sr.from-left  { transform: translateX(-60px); }
.sr.from-right { transform: translateX( 60px); }
.sr.visible    { opacity: 1 !important; transform: none !important; }

.paper-strip {
width: 100%;
min-height: 44vh;
display: flex;
align-items: center;
padding: 5rem 2rem;
position: relative;
overflow: hidden;
border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(42,157,143,.07);
}
.paper-strip:nth-child(odd)  { background: #0a1f1e; }
.paper-strip:nth-child(even) { background: #091b1a; }
.paper-strip.left  { justify-content: flex-start; }
.paper-strip.right { justify-content: flex-end; }
.paper-strip.left  .strip-inner { margin-left: 9%; }
.paper-strip.right .strip-inner { margin-right: 9%; }
.strip-inner { max-width: 480px; }

.v-accent {
position: absolute;
top: 10%; bottom: 10%;
width: 2px;
background: linear-gradient(to bottom, transparent, #2a9d8f 40%, #2a9d8f 60%, transparent);
border-radius: 2px;
}
.paper-strip.left  .v-accent { left: 5.5%; }
.paper-strip.right .v-accent { right: 5.5%; }

.paper-strip::after {
content: '';
position: absolute;
bottom: 0; left: 0; right: 0;
height: 1px;
background: linear-gradient(90deg, transparent, rgba(42,157,143,.3), transparent);
opacity: 0;
transition: opacity .4s;
}
.paper-strip:hover::after { opacity: 1; }

.strip-tag {
font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace;
font-size: .7rem;
letter-spacing: .2em;
text-transform: uppercase;
color: #2a9d8f;
font-weight: 700;
margin-bottom: .9rem;
}
.strip-tag::before { content: '> '; opacity: .5; }

.strip-title {
font-size: clamp(1.35rem, 2.8vw, 2.1rem);
font-weight: 800;
color: #fff;
line-height: 1.18;
letter-spacing: -.022em;
margin: 0 0 1.2rem;
}
.strip-title em { color: #2a9d8f; font-style: normal; }

.strip-meta {
font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace;
font-size: .78rem;
color: rgba(255,255,255,.32);
letter-spacing: .04em;
}

.about-section {
background: #060f0e;
padding: 6rem 2rem;
display: flex;
justify-content: center;
align-items: center;
}
.about-box {
max-width: 720px;
width: 100%;
border: 1px solid rgba(42,157,143,.25);
border-radius: 18px;
padding: 3rem 3.5rem;
background: rgba(42,157,143,.03);
box-shadow: 0 0 50px rgba(42,157,143,.06), inset 0 1px 0 rgba(42,157,143,.12);
position: relative;
}
.about-box::before {
content: '';
position: absolute;
inset: -1px;
border-radius: 18px;
background: linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(42,157,143,.18) 0%, transparent 55%);
pointer-events: none;
}
.about-label {
font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace;
font-size: .7rem;
letter-spacing: .22em;
text-transform: uppercase;
color: #2a9d8f;
font-weight: 700;
margin-bottom: 1.4rem;
display: block;
}
.about-box p {
font-size: 1.08rem;
color: rgba(255,255,255,.75);
line-height: 1.85;
margin: 0;
}
.about-box strong { color: #2a9d8f; font-weight: 700; }

.network-section {
position: relative;
background: #060f0e;
height: 520px;
overflow: hidden;
}
#net-canvas {
position: absolute;
inset: 0;
width: 100%;
height: 100%;
display: block;
}
.net-overlay {
position: absolute;
inset: 0;
display: flex;
flex-direction: column;
align-items: center;
justify-content: center;
pointer-events: none;
z-index: 2;
}
.net-label {
font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace;
font-size: .68rem;
letter-spacing: .28em;
text-transform: uppercase;
color: rgba(42,157,143,.6);
margin-bottom: .9rem;
}
.net-title {
font-size: clamp(1.5rem, 3vw, 2.6rem);
font-weight: 800;
color: #fff;
letter-spacing: -.02em;
text-align: center;
}
.net-title span { color: #2a9d8f; }
.net-status {
margin-top: 1.2rem;
font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace;
font-size: .68rem;
letter-spacing: .14em;
color: rgba(42,157,143,.5);
display: flex;
align-items: center;
gap: .5rem;
}
.net-dot {
width: 6px; height: 6px;
border-radius: 50%;
background: #2a9d8f;
animation: pulse 2s ease-in-out infinite;
}
@keyframes pulse {
0%,100% { opacity: 1; box-shadow: 0 0 0 0 rgba(42,157,143,.4); }
50%      { opacity: .6; box-shadow: 0 0 0 5px rgba(42,157,143,0); }
}

@media (max-width: 640px) {
.paper-strip.left  .strip-inner,
.paper-strip.right .strip-inner { margin: 0 auto; }
.v-accent { display: none; }
.about-box { padding: 2rem 1.6rem; }
}
</style>

<section class="paper-strip left">
<div class="v-accent"></div>
<div class="strip-inner sr from-left">
<p class="strip-tag">Energy Markets</p>
<h2 class="strip-title">Machine Learning for Detecting<br><em>Collusion &amp; Capacity Withholding</em><br>in Wholesale Electricity Markets</h2>
<p class="strip-meta">With Martin Huber &amp; Jeremy Proz &nbsp;·&nbsp; Forthcoming</p>
</div>
</section>

<section class="paper-strip right">
<div class="v-accent"></div>
<div class="strip-inner sr from-right">
<p class="strip-tag">Market Geography</p>
<h2 class="strip-title">The Spatial Structure of<br><em>Competitive Interactions</em><br>in Public Procurement Networks</h2>
<p class="strip-meta">With Julie LeGallo &amp; Jean Dubé &nbsp;·&nbsp; Working Paper</p>
</div>
</section>

<section class="paper-strip left">
<div class="v-accent"></div>
<div class="strip-inner sr from-left">
<p class="strip-tag">Antitrust Policy</p>
<h2 class="strip-title">Business as Usual:<br>The Case of the<br><em>Antitrust Inquiry in Quebec</em></h2>
<p class="strip-meta">Job Market Paper</p>
</div>
</section>

<section class="about-section">
<div class="about-box sr">
<span class="about-label">// Who I Am</span>
<p>I'm a <strong>PhD Candidate</strong> specialising in <strong>competition economics</strong> at Université de Bourgogne, working at CESAER. My work combines <strong>causal inference, machine learning, and network analysis</strong> to study collusive behaviour. I conduct econometric analysis to support <strong>antitrust enforcement and policy design</strong>.</p>
</div>
</section>

<section class="network-section">
<canvas id="net-canvas"></canvas>
<div class="net-overlay">
<p class="net-label">// Research Network</p>
<h2 class="net-title">Competition · <span>Markets</span> · Enforcement</h2>
<div class="net-status">
<span class="net-dot"></span>
Network Active
</div>
</div>
</section>

<script>
(function () {
var io = new IntersectionObserver(function (entries) {
entries.forEach(function (e) {
if (e.isIntersecting) { e.target.classList.add('visible'); io.unobserve(e.target); }
});
}, { threshold: 0.12 });
document.querySelectorAll('.sr').forEach(function (el) { io.observe(el); });
})();

(function () {
var canvas = document.getElementById('net-canvas');
var ctx    = canvas.getContext('2d');
var nodes  = [];
var N      = 72;
var LINK   = 145;
var R      = '42,157,143';

function resize() {
canvas.width  = canvas.offsetWidth;
canvas.height = canvas.offsetHeight;
}

function init() {
resize();
nodes = [];
for (var i = 0; i < N; i++) {
nodes.push({
x  : Math.random() * canvas.width,
y  : Math.random() * canvas.height,
vx : (Math.random() - .5) * .55,
vy : (Math.random() - .5) * .55,
r  : Math.random() * 2.2 + 1.4
});
}
}

function tick() {
ctx.clearRect(0, 0, canvas.width, canvas.height);
for (var i = 0; i < nodes.length; i++) {
for (var j = i + 1; j < nodes.length; j++) {
var dx = nodes[i].x - nodes[j].x;
var dy = nodes[i].y - nodes[j].y;
var d  = Math.sqrt(dx*dx + dy*dy);
if (d < LINK) {
var a = (1 - d / LINK) * .45;
ctx.beginPath();
ctx.moveTo(nodes[i].x, nodes[i].y);
ctx.lineTo(nodes[j].x, nodes[j].y);
ctx.strokeStyle = 'rgba(' + R + ',' + a + ')';
ctx.lineWidth   = .9;
ctx.stroke();
}
}
}
ctx.shadowBlur  = 8;
ctx.shadowColor = 'rgba(' + R + ',.55)';
nodes.forEach(function (n) {
ctx.beginPath();
ctx.arc(n.x, n.y, n.r, 0, Math.PI * 2);
ctx.fillStyle = 'rgba(' + R + ',.82)';
ctx.fill();
});
ctx.shadowBlur = 0;
nodes.forEach(function (n) {
n.x += n.vx;
n.y += n.vy;
if (n.x < 0 || n.x > canvas.width)  n.vx *= -1;
if (n.y < 0 || n.y > canvas.height) n.vy *= -1;
});
requestAnimationFrame(tick);
}

window.addEventListener('resize', init);
init();
tick();
})();
</script>
